set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_all
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{150}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_5star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{111}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_4star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{154}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_3star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{151}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_2star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{152}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_1star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{155}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_under_5star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{156}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_under_4star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{157}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_under_3star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{158}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_under_2star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{153}

set_value.name: $AssignMouseover_under_1star
set_value.exact: if not $AssignActive then readtext.{98765}.{32} else readtext.{98765}.{159}

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_1star
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_1star then readtext.{98765}.{205}.[$Short1_0] else readtext.{98765}.{165}))

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_2star
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_2star then readtext.{98765}.{206}.[$Short2_0, $Short2_1] else readtext.{98765}.{164}))

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_3star
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_3star then readtext.{98765}.{207}.[$Short3_0, $Short3_1, $Short3_2] else readtext.{98765}.{162}))

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_4star
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_4star then readtext.{98765}.{208}.[$Short4_0, $Short4_1, $Short4_2, $Short4_3] else readtext.{98765}.{161}))

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_5star
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_5star then readtext.{98765}.{209}.[$ShortMax_0, $ShortMax_1, $ShortMax_2, $ShortMax_3, $ShortMax_4] else readtext.{98765}.{166}))

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_max
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else readtext.{98765}.{160})

set_value.name: $SeminarMouseover_single
set_value.exact: if not $SeminarActive then readtext.{98765}.{52} else (if not $AnySeminar then readtext.{98765}.{204} else (if not $Active_single then (if $SingleParams.count gt 0 then readtext.{98765}.{$SingleShortTid}.{$SingleParams} else readtext.{98765}.{$SingleShortTid}) else readtext.{98765}.{163}))

set_value.name: $FillMouseover
set_value.exact: if not $FillActive then readtext.{98765}.{190} else readtext.{98765}.{50}

set_value.name: $UnassignMouseover
set_value.exact: if not $UnassignActive then readtext.{98765}.{31} else (if $HasFullShipWithPilot then (readtext.{98765}.{30} + '\n' + (if $Ships.count gt 1 then readtext.{98765}.{36} else readtext.{98765}.{35})) else readtext.{98765}.{30})

set_value.name: $FireMouseover
set_value.exact: if not $FireActive then readtext.{98765}.{41} else readtext.{98765}.{40}

set_value.name: $DropCargoMouseover
set_value.exact: if not $DropCargoActive then readtext.{98765}.{54} else readtext.{98765}.{53}

debug_text.text: '[SCM] Ship full. Firing worst crew ' + $WorstCrewName + ' (score: ' + $WorstSkill + ') to make space for dismissed pilot.'
'[SCM] Unassigning pilot for: ' + $Ship.knownname + ' | pilot_name=' + $Pilot.knownname + ' | pilot_exists=' + $PilotExists + ' | template=' + $Template
'[SCM] Warning: No npctemplate found for pilot!'
